docs.title: Publications
docs.text:
DOF-Based Mechanism Design of RigFlex Parallel Robots (IROS 2025 – under review) Authors: Xiao Wang, Shuo Yang, Zihe Lei, Ke Wu†, Guohua Chen Abstract This paper proposes a degree-of-freedom driven design methodology for the rigid-flexible coupled parallel robot RigFlex. Using a 3-RRR architecture as an example, three RigFlex prototypes are developed. Non-linear Euler-Bernoulli and Cosserat beam models are employed to evaluate workspace accuracy and compliance. Results show that the method achieves high stiffness while retaining desirable flexibility, providing a systematic framework for RigFlex mechanism design. Keywords: RigFlex Robot, Parallel Mechanism, Compliance, DOF Analysis

📄 Download PDF

docs.title: About Me 🥳
docs.text:
约 306 个字 预计阅读时间 2 分钟

Yang Shuo / Wali

中文English

你好！我是 杨朔，北京化工大学 2023 级本科生。 很高兴通过互联网与你相遇 😊。 我对 深度学习、机器人以及大模型 充满热情，也喜欢分享自己的学习心得与思考。 如果感兴趣，欢迎访问我的 知乎 🔗。

我乐于结识新朋友，也欢迎通过 微信 与我交流 🙌。 想了解我的学术经历？请访问我的 学术主页 🎓！

如果你也在 北京，不妨线下面聊，一起学习或探索城市！ 当然，你也可以随时给我发 邮件 📧。

课余时间，我热衷于 乒乓球 🏓 和 游泳 🏊。 如果你也喜欢这些运动，欢迎一起约练！

Hi! I'm Shuo Yang, an undergraduate student (Class of 2023) at Beijing University of Chemical Technology. I'm delighted to meet you here on the internet 😊. I'm passionate about deep learning, robotics, and large-scale models, and I enjoy sharing my learning experiences and reflections. Feel free to check out my Zhihu 🔗 if you're interested.

I love meeting new friends—feel free to connect with me on WeChat 🙌. If you're also in Beijing, let's grab a coffee or study together offline! You can always drop me an email 📧 as well.

Outside academics, I'm a big fan of table tennis 🏓 and swimming 🏊. If you share these hobbies, let's play or swim together!
